title: Workhorse Shareholders Approve Merger with Motiv Electric Trucks
text: Workhorse shareholders voted to approve the merger with Motiv Electric Trucks at the 2025 Annual Meeting on November 25, 2025. The merger combination creates a leading North American medium-duty electric truck OEM with a full range of Class 4-6 trucks valued at approximately $105 million. Upon closing, Motiv's controlling investor owns approximately 62.5% of the combined company, while Workhorse shareholders own approximately 26.5% and Workhorse's existing senior secured lender has rights to receive common stock representing approximately 11%. Motiv's controlling investor provided Workhorse with up to $50 million in new debt financing capacity, with approximately $10 million available in a revolving credit facility. The companies expect to achieve at least $20 million of cost synergies through research and development, general and administrative, and facility cost reductions by the end of 2026.
